content: API contract drift: mock data and live API diverge in ~70% of parallel team projects. Root cause: no schema validation between mock JSON and API spec, frontend builds UI against incorrect shapes. Solution: store OpenAPI spec in monorepo, autogenerate types, validate mock shapes against spec in CI. For Macost: lock contract to v1.0 before implementation, use Zod/TypeScript types derived from API_CONTRACT.md, validate mock JSON shape against schema before integration day.
